projects.name: DevBoard Backend API
projects.description: Production-ready Node.js & Express API with comprehensive JWT authentication, HttpOnly cookies, and repository-pattern db services.

projects.name: SaaS Client Dashboard
projects.description: Vite & React client interface with interactive Kanban flows, live code snippet search, and team timeline streams.

projects.name: My First DevBoard Project

projects.name: My First DevBoard Project
projects.description: A sample project loaded with Kanban tasks, snippets, and mock APIs to demonstrate DevBoard features.

tasks.title: Configure JWT Auth with HttpOnly cookies
tasks.description: Set up a robust full-stack authentication flow. Implement access token validation, refresh token rotation, and strict security cookies.

tasks.title: Create MongoDB schema with index performance tuning
tasks.description: Optimize collections with proper composite indexes (e.g., `projectId` + `status` + `priority`). Implement aggregation pipelines for productivity charts.

tasks.title: Integrate Server-Side Gemini Code Assistant
tasks.description: Implement `/api/ai/optimize` endpoint using the `@google/genai` SDK. Allow team members to review, refactor, and generate clean snippets directly within the vault.

tasks.title: Add responsive drag-and-drop mechanics to board
tasks.description: Leverage HTML5 Drag & Drop or lightweight hooks for Kanban updates. Support optimistic UI state changes and push immediate API payloads.

tasks.title: Draft production deploy checklist
tasks.description: Review security response headers, rate limiter policies, CORS whitelist, environment variable schema validation, and cache rules.

tasks.title: Explore DevBoard Kanban board
tasks.description: Try moving this card to "Done" using the drag or move buttons, edit labels, or add comment threads.

tasks.title: Save your first code snippet
tasks.description: Head to the Snippet Vault and save a useful code segment. Categorize it by language and tag it for quick search.

comments.content: I have exposed the initial config properties on the backend. Let me know when you start connecting the client interface!

snippets.description: A fully typed React hook designed for handling client-side HTTP requests with automated lifecycle cleanups and fetch abort signals.

resources.title: REST Standard Guidelines & Specs
resources.content:
Follow standard HTTP status codes: 200 OK, 201 Created, 400 Bad Request, 401 Unauthorized, 403 Forbidden, 404 Not Found, 500 Internal Server Error.
All responses should follow a consistent payload envelope structure.
